message:
feat(web): IME composition state normalizer for reliable CJK/dead-key input

Add CompositionState tracker and CompositionRewrite type to normalize
raw DOM composition events into a well-formed stream for the terminal
emulator. This handles edge cases that browsers produce inconsistently:

- update/end without prior start: synthesizes a start event
- New composition while one is active: synthesizes cancel for the old one
- Focus loss during composition: emits synthetic cancel
- Key events during active composition: suppressed to prevent double-insert

The normalizer guarantees that the output stream always follows the
pattern start -> update* -> (end | cancel), regardless of host browser
quirks, making downstream text insertion logic much simpler.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
